text.title: Service Bootstrap Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a new production-bound service that will take traffic within 30 days?

branch.when: traffic_gate_open == true AND any_item_done == false AND waiver_reason == null

text.example: New svc-refunds service. Scaffold from platform template. 12-item walk: repo (alice), CI (bob), logging (alice), metrics (carol), healthcheck (alice), runbook (carol), on-call rota (eve), dashboards (carol), alerts (carol), secrets (frank), deploy (bob), postmortem template (carol). All done with evidence_links. Platform lead opens LB traffic gate.
